message.content:
HAMBISA BEKUMA TEFERA
Sales Manager
+251 952 341 525 | hambisa1992@gmail.com | Addis Ababa, Ethiopia
Amharic (Native) · English (Professional) · Afaan Oromo (Fluent) · Somali (Conversational)

ABOUT ME
I have spent over eight years in sales — covering territories across Eastern Ethiopia and Addis Ababa, sitting across from buyers in Dire Dawa, Jigjiga, and the capital, and learning that every market has its own pace, its own trust signals, and its own way of doing business. That variety shaped how I approach sales: not as a formula to repeat, but as a problem to read fresh in each context.
Today I manage 150+ B2B accounts at Romel General Trading in Addis Ababa, and before that I led marketing for OL-BRIGHT College as it grew from one branch to two — with a third in the pipeline. At Deran PLC, I did not inherit a sales department — I built one from zero, then grew revenue by 20% in two years. My MBA and BSc in Agribusiness give me the frameworks; the years across different markets give me the instincts.
What I bring to any role: territory ownership, distributor trust, team coaching, and an honest eye on the market. I speak four languages, which in this region is not a footnote — it opens doors that stay closed for others.

WHAT I DO WELL
· Territory & Area Sales Management
· Route-to-Market Execution
· Market Expansion & New Account Opening
· Field Team Leadership & Coaching
· Negotiation & Deal Closing
· Distributor & Channel Development
· B2B Account & Relationship Management
· Sales Planning, Target-Setting & Forecasting
· Competitor & Market Intelligence
· Sales Reporting & Excel Analysis

CAREER HISTORY
Route Sales Representative
Romel General Trading | January 2026 – Present
– Cover a territory of 150+ B2B retail and wholesale accounts on a structured weekly route keeping stock levels, visibility, and relationships strong
– Sell electrical products into competitive trade channels knowing each customer buying cycle, shelf constraints, and when to push and when to wait
– Open new accounts monthly by spotting coverage gaps and turning cold visits into active buyers — portfolio has grown consistently since joining
– Monitor competitor pricing moves, new products and territory plays and flag relevant intelligence to the team
– Handle complaints and credit issues directly with customers, keeping accounts loyal and reducing churn

Marketing Manager
OL-BRIGHT International College | December 2022 – November 2025
– Took charge of marketing and student acquisition when the college had one branch; left with two open and a third in planning
– Drove 30%+ rise in enrollment through campaigns targeting the right communities using the right channels and language
– Built college presence from near-zero: community outreach, digital campaigns, school and employer partnerships — engagement up 45% in three years
– Contributed to branch location decisions, pricing reviews, and competitive positioning at leadership level

Marketing & Sales Manager
Deran PLC | December 2020 – November 2022
– Built the marketing and sales department from zero: structure, hiring, go-to-market strategy, reporting and processes
– Drove 20% revenue growth in two years through new customer acquisition, fixing retention issues, and aligning marketing with delivery
– Found and fixed operational bottlenecks slowing order processing and frustrating key accounts
– Built a sales training cadence focused on product knowledge — once reps could answer hard questions, close rates improved

Territory Sales Manager
SMADL Communication Terminal Factory PLC | July 2016 – November 2020
– Managed sales across Adama, Asella, Chiro, Awash, Dire Dawa, Harar, Jigjiga, and the Somali Region
– Speaking Afaan Oromo and conversational Somali opened doors that would have stayed closed otherwise
– Kept revenue consistent through regular account visits, clear rep targets, and fast responses to customer issues
– Hired and trained sales reps across multiple towns, set weekly plans, rode with them and held them to measurable output
– Developed pitch materials and pricing presentations that improved buyer confidence and conversion rates

EDUCATION
Master of Business Administration (MBA) — Addis Ababa Medical & Business College, 2018
BSc in Agribusiness & Value Chain Management — Jimma University, 2014

CERTIFICATIONS & RECOGNITION
Best Diploma Award, Turkey — 2023 · SPSS — Statistical Data Analysis
· Microsoft Office: Excel, Word, PowerPoint (Advanced)
